name: sebc-dev-marketplace
description: Marketplace de plugins Claude Code pour developpeurs. Skills, commands et workflows pour le developpement web et l'ecriture technique.

plugins.name: scd-astro
plugins.description: Skill Astro 6.x on Cloudflare Workers. Rendering modes, Content Layer, Live Collections, Cloudflare bindings via cloudflare:workers, Zod 4, Fonts API, workerd dev, breaking-change prevention.

plugins.name: scd-writer
plugins.description: Workflow d'ecriture en 7 phases pour developpeur-auteur. L'humain ecrit et pense, Claude questionne, structure et polit. Ne genere jamais de contenu a la place de l'auteur.

plugins.name: scd-forge
plugins.description: Architectural design patterns for Claude Code plugins. Component selection with skill-vs-workflow guard, context budget architecture, multi-component orchestration, skill description optimization (TRIGGER/SKIP, eval methodology), correct references/ placement, and quality validation. Complements plugin-dev with holistic design guidance.

plugins.name: scd-svelte
plugins.description: Skill Svelte 5 + SvelteKit 2. Runes, components, routing, data loading, state management, hooks, TypeScript, testing, deployment, ecosystem selection, anti-pattern prevention. Complements the Svelte MCP server.

plugins.name: scd-tauri
plugins.description: Skill Tauri v2 desktop and mobile. Architecture, security (capabilities, permissions, scopes, CSP), IPC bridge (commands, events, channels, state), plugin ecosystem (30+ official), desktop patterns (multi-window, tray, menus, sidecars), mobile (Android, iOS), build pipeline, code signing, updater, CI/CD, testing. Uses WebFetch for official docs lookup.

plugins.name: scd-vuejs
plugins.description: Skill Vue 3 (3.4+/3.5+) production. Composition API, Pinia, Vue Router v4, TypeScript, Vite. Bonnes pratiques, pieges, anti-patterns, decisions architecturales.

plugins.name: scd-qmd
plugins.description: On-device search engine for project docs and crawled technical documentation. Hybrid search (BM25 + vector + LLM re-ranking) via qmd with MCP integration, collection management, web doc crawling, and progressive search workflows.

plugins.name: scd-review
plugins.description: Code review pipeline on the current branch with interactive per-observation decisions (apply/skip/defer/discuss) and persisted state for safe interruption/resume. Chained review+validation pipeline, correction_prompt for precise fixes, business context injection, model profiles, inline-only PR/MR comments. --auto-fix flag preserves the v1.0 non-interactive behavior for CI use.
